name: Bar Leather Apron
tagline: One of the world's best cocktail bars hidden on a downtown Honolulu mezzanine — 15 seats, Japanese technique, local ingredients.
talkStory: Hidden on the mezzanine of the TOPA Financial Center, this tiny bar was named one of the best in the world. With only about 15 seats, it feels like a private club. Bartenders Justin Park and Tom Park create immaculate craft cocktails using house-made syrups, local ingredients, and Japanese technique. Reserve in advance online. Go early in the week for a more intimate experience. This is where Honolulu's cocktail cognoscenti drink.
